scripts.dev: concurrently "sh -c 'set -a; [ -f backend/.env ] && . backend/.env; set +a; ALL_PROXY= HTTP_PROXY= HTTPS_PROXY= SOCKS_PROXY= SOCKS5_PROXY= all_proxy= http_proxy= https_proxy= socks_proxy= socks5_proxy= NO_PROXY=127.0.0.1,::1,localhost no_proxy=127.0.0.1,::1,localhost PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin:/usr/local/opt/openjdk/bin:$PATH\" ./backend/mvnw -f backend/pom.xml -Dmaven.test.skip=true spring-boot:run'" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:fixed:restart: npm run dev:fixed:stop && npm run dev:fixed:start
scripts.frontend:url: node -e "const http=require('http');const req=http.get('http://localhost:5175/',res=>{console.log('Frontend: http://localhost:5175/ ('+res.statusCode+')');process.exit(0)});req.on('error',()=>{console.log('Frontend не запущен на http://localhost:5175/');process.exit(1)});req.setTimeout(1200,()=>{req.destroy();console.log('Frontend не отвечает на http://localhost:5175/');process.exit(1)});"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin:/usr/local/opt/openjdk/bin:$PATH" ./backend/mvnw -f backend/pom.xml package
scripts.start: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f backend/.env ] && . backend/.env; set +a; ALL_PROXY= HTTP_PROXY= HTTPS_PROXY= SOCKS_PROXY= SOCKS5_PROXY= all_proxy= http_proxy= https_proxy= socks_proxy= socks5_proxy= NO_PROXY=127.0.0.1,::1,localhost no_proxy=127.0.0.1,::1,localhost PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin:/usr/local/opt/openjdk/bin:$PATH" ./backend/mvnw -f backend/pom.xml -Dmaven.test.skip=true spring-boot:run'
